---
title: "Bioinformatics pipeline summary"
subtitle: "Where we see the pipeline processes"
date: last-modified
author:
  - name: Adrien Taudière
    url: https://adrientaudiere.github.io/bioinfo.starter/analysis/01_bioinformatics.qmd
    affiliation: IdEst
    affiliation-url: https://orcid.org/my-orcid?orcid=0000-0003-1088-1182
citation: true
---

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(targets)
library(MiscMetabar)
here::i_am("analysis/01_bioinformatics.qmd")
source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
source(here::here("R/styles.R"))
```

```{r child="../R/styles.qmd"}

```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(knitr)
library(targets)
library(MiscMetabar)
here::i_am("analysis/02_alpha_diversity.qmd")
devtools::load_all("~/Nextcloud/IdEst/Projets/pqverse/pqverse_pkg/MiscMetabar")
devtools::load_all("~/Nextcloud/IdEst/Projets/pqverse/pqverse_pkg/comparpq")
devtools::load_all("~/Nextcloud/IdEst/Projets/pqverse/pqverse_pkg/tidypq")
```

```{r}
d_16S <- readRDS(here::here("data/data_final/d_16S.rds"))
d_pmoA <- readRDS(here::here("data/data_final/d_pmoA.rds"))
d_mcrA <- readRDS(here::here("data/data_final/d_mcrA.rds"))
```


```{r}
d_3 <- comparpq::list_phyloseq( list("16S" = d_16S, "pmoA" = d_pmoA, "mcrA" = d_mcrA), compute_dist=FALSE)
```


```{r}
comparpq::estim_diff_pq(d_16S, "Humidity")
gg_bubbles_pq(d_16S, facet_by = "Humidity") + no_legend()
```


```{r}
hill_curves_pq(d_16S, "Humidity", one_plot = TRUE) + theme_idest() + no_legend()
MiscMetabar::ggbetween_pq(d_16S, q = 1, "Humidity", one_plot = TRUE) + theme_idest()
MiscMetabar::ggbetween_pq(d_16S, q = 1, "Agricultural_practices", one_plot = TRUE) + theme_idest()
MiscMetabar::ggbetween_pq(d_16S, q = 1, "Site", one_plot = TRUE) + theme_idest()
```
